mano_cua.result_summary: ar-EG locale设置后页面白屏崩溃：DateInput.jsx:143 TypeError Cannot read properties of null (reading '0')，_renderCustomInputs函数解析阿拉伯语日期格式时返回null导致React组件树完全崩溃
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Setting locale to 'ar-EG' causes immediate white screen crash. Console shows Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading '0') at _renderCustomInputs (DateInput.jsx:143:11). The Arabic locale date format parsing returns unexpected null value, crashing the entire React component tree.
